payload.description: Initiatives that enhance employee engagement and operational transparency

payload.entity_name: SHARP Program (Safety Hazards Awareness and Risk Prevention)
payload.description: Safety training program strengthening safety practices across the organization
Program to reduce bus fare evasion supported by analytical expertise
Fare enforcement team focusing on high-risk locations across multiple bus routes
Revamped employee recognition program launched by Nicholas Pyvovar
Led by Ed Perricone, focuses on track safety audits with Operations and Training
Governed by a 23-member Board of Directors, organized in eight committees

Special Inspectors Saamar Manuel, Anthony Fuller, and Mohammed Uddin conducted scheduled inspection at Unionport Yard, observed four trespassers, discovered a 16-year-old male in an NYCT vest within a train car, secured until NYPD Vandals Unit arrived
Ciara Taylor helped improve ADA 21-day mandated timeframe compliance by 24.5% on a daily basis
The MTA serves a population of 15.3 million people
The MTA serves a 5,000-square-mile travel area surrounding New York City
NYCT and MTA Bus serve 4,500,000 passengers a day
NYCT and MTA Bus employ 45,000 employees
NYCT operates nearly 6,700 subway cars
NYCT and MTA Bus operate 5,800 buses
NYCT maintains 472 subway stations
NYCT maintains 640 miles of track

payload.description: NYCT maintains 27 bus depots and 70 shops and yards

issues: metric_claim payload with raw_value_text should include normalized numeric value or value_min/value_max

payload.description: Fleet of 1160 MTA owned Paratransit vehicles
NYCT maintains 27 bus depots
NYCT maintains 70 shops and yards
Subway service change involving F and M lines, presented to numerous elected officials and community stakeholders
One of eight committees of the MTA Board of Directors

payload.claim_text: Wilbert Colon observed a broken rail under a train, reported it to Operations Control Center, and requested assistance from Maintenance of Way Track. His swift actions conceivably prevented a derailment which would have caused damage to equipment and injury to employees and customers.
payload.subject: Wilbert Colon

payload.claim_text: Ruiqi Gan automated a full data pipeline for injury-on-duty (IOD) data, Subways' first automated access to this dataset, and developed a flexible dashboard now used by senior safety leadership
payload.subject: Ruiqi Gan

payload.claim_text: Bus Operator Guy Simeone acted swiftly when a 17-year-old passenger on his bus became unresponsive. He called 9-1-1, moved the young man to the floor, and provided aid until EMS and NYPD arrived. The doctor said Simeone's quick thinking played a pivotal role in the young man's survival.
payload.subject: Guy Simeone

payload.claim_text: Marcos Rodriguez-Anderseo's analytical expertise enabled the Eagle Team to identify high-risk locations and implement deployment schedules, directly contributing to a measurable reduction in bus fare evasion
payload.subject: Marcos Rodriguez-Anderseo

payload.claim_text: Each of our carriers have shown a decrease in collision rates, an increase in MDBF (mean distance between failure), all leading to greater availability of the vehicles in our fleet which has enabled Paratransit to achieve record ridership levels while also achieving record high customer satisfaction rates
payload.subject: Paratransit

tool_args.label: Ed Perricone Joint Track Safety Audit

payload.claim_text: Ed Perricone has led the Joint Track Safety Audit team for over a year and a half, opening clear lines of communication with Operations and Training. He serves as a key liaison with the Public Transportation Safety Board and the Federal Transit Administration on Roadway Worker Protection regulations.
payload.subject: Edward Perricone

payload.claim_text: Patrick Scalise played a central role in planning, implementing, and communicating the F/M swap service change, presenting the proposal to numerous elected officials and community stakeholders. He also organized more than 400 customer ambassador shifts leading up to and during implementation.
payload.subject: Patrick Scalise

payload.description: Xinting Lu, Marcos Rodriguez-Anderseo, Nicholas Pyvovar, Anthony Ventimiglia, and Guy Simeone are all in the Department of Buses

payload.claim_text: Members of the New York City Transit Committee include: Haeda Mihaltses (Chair), Andrew Albert, Samuel Chu, Dan Garodnick, David Jones, Melva Miller, Meera Joshi, John Ross 'JR' Rizzo, John Samuelsen, Lisa Sorin, Midori Valdivia
payload.subject: New York City Transit Committee
